stories.title: NHL mock draft: Final projection of all 32 picks i...
stories.summary: Though the top two picks appear to be locked in, what happens after that? Here's the final projection before Friday's first round.

stories.title: Are the Stars trading Jason Robertson? The latest ...
stories.summary: The first round is Friday. Our reporters pass along the latest intel they're hearing from around the league.

stories.title: Dembélé first-half hat trick sees France win group...
stories.summary: France forward Ousmane Dembélé scored a first-half hat trick, including one off an assist from Kylian Mbappé, to help his team to a 4-1 win over Norway at the FIFA World Cup on Friday.

stories.title: CFL won't allow Brendan Sorsby to join league
stories.summary: The CFL says quarterback Brendan Sorsby will not be allowed to join any of its teams for the upcoming season.

stories.title: Chambliss pushes back on Kiffin's recruiting take
stories.summary: Ole Miss quarterback Trinidad Chambliss on Friday took issue with first-year LSU coach Lane Kiffin's recent comments that Ole Miss' past embrace of Confederate symbols made recruiting Black players more difficult.
